name: Fospha
description: Full-funnel Bayesian media mix model delivering daily ad-level measurement for DTC, Amazon and mobile commerce brands.

seo.title: Fospha — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Fospha: Full-funnel Bayesian media mix model delivering daily ad-level measurement for DTC, Amazon and mobile commerce brands.

when_to_use: Daily Bayesian MMM for DTC brands optimizing channel budget allocation
Amazon and mobile commerce attribution with full-funnel media measurement
Measuring true incremental ROAS across Meta, TikTok, and Google simultaneously
Marketing mix modeling updated daily for rapid budget reallocation decisions

pros: Good fit for DTC and Amazon ecosystems
Actionable mix recommendations, not just reports
Onboarding structured for marketing teams, not data scientists
cons: Requires enough spend to produce useful signal
Pricing aimed at mid-market and up
Less transparent modeling than open-source alternatives
review.verdict: Solid managed MMM for DTC brands needing daily decisions, but does not replace an MMP for mobile apps.
review.best_for: DTC and Amazon brands with steady spend wanting daily MMM-driven allocation.
review.not_for: Early-stage or low-spend brands, or pure mobile apps needing SKAN.
